title: Reverse flow with corrupted backup data
description: Backup data corrupted during creation preventing successful rollback

mutation.description: Introduce corruption in backup creation process

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect corrupted backup in reverse flow

title: Rollback with dependency ordering issues
description: Rollback operations performed in wrong order causing failures

mutation.description: Reverse dependency order in rollback script

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect incorrect rollback ordering

title: Reverse flow timeout during large data restoration
description: Restoration of large datasets exceeds timeout limits

mutation.description: Add large data set that exceeds timeout

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect timeout in reverse flow operations

title: Reverse migration with schema incompatibilities
description: Database migration rollback fails due to schema changes

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect schema incompatibility in reverse migration

title: Reverse flow with external service unavailability
description: Rollback fails because external services are unavailable

mutation.description: Depend on unavailable external service for rollback

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect external dependency in reverse flow

title: Partial rollback leaving system in inconsistent state
description: Rollback succeeds partially but leaves system inconsistent

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect partial rollback inconsistency

title: Reverse flow with concurrent modifications
description: Concurrent changes during rollback cause conflicts

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect concurrent modification conflicts in reverse flow

title: Reverse flow with encrypted data loss
description: Rollback loses encryption keys preventing data restoration

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect encryption key loss in reverse flow

title: Reverse flow with network partition
description: Network partition during distributed rollback causes failure

mutation.description: Add network partition simulation in rollback

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect network partition affecting reverse flow

title: Reverse flow with resource exhaustion
description: Rollback exhausts system resources preventing completion

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect resource exhaustion in reverse flow
